description: A plain candid color photograph with no on-image text, graphics, or design overlays. It shows a smiling middle-aged woman (consistent with Secretary Kristi Noem) seated on an airboat, giving an enthusiastic thumbs-up to the camera. She wears a backwards camouflage ball cap, large over-ear hearing-protection headphones/earmuffs, a black long-sleeve top and a camouflage life-vest marked 'Onyx' and 'A/M/24', with sunglasses tucked into the vest and bracelets and a ring on her hand. Behind her is the airboat's large round caged propeller fan, and to the right sits another passenger in a purple polo shirt; the background is a bright blue sky over flat green wetlands/Everglades. The image is a snapshot from an official outing, not a designed meme/poster. Despite the tweet's jokey caption ('THE SMILE OF A PATRIOT WHO KNOWS TOMORROW IS LABOR DAY'), the picture itself carries no graphic design. Target audience: general supporters, conveying upbeat patriotic personality content.
